note: Manually curated snapshot of current firmware versions per Tektronix oscilloscope family. This is a STOPGAP — the full changelog / release-notes RAG corpus is the real fix. Verify against tek.com for the authoritative current version before making a call on upgrade decisions. Release notes are linked; fetch the URL directly for the full changelog PDF content (tek_docs RAG does not index these).
updateProcedure: Re-run WebSearch for 'Tektronix <family> firmware latest version site:tek.com' and update the entries below. Bump lastUpdated. Ship via the normal V2 → Public → mcp-server sync.

MSO2.notes: Non-Windows only (2 Series has no Windows variant). Known issue on V2.14.3.2448: global MASK:COUNt:* queries hang (VI_ERROR_TMO); use per-slot MASK:MASK<x>:TESt:STATUS? — fixed status unknown in later releases, verify before relying.

MSO4.notes: Compatible ONLY with MSO44 and MSO46. Do NOT install on 4 Series B (MSO44B / MSO46B) — separate firmware stream.

MSO5.notes: Available in both Windows and non-Windows variants at the same version. Pick based on the scope OS.

MSO6.notes: 6 Series and 6 Series B share the same V2.24.4 firmware stream.
